aninfo-synopsis-ame_to_kimi_to:
While writer Fuji was walking home in a storm, her attention was drawn to something peculiar: a dog-like animal asking her to take it in. Though initially reluctant, she was won over when it gave her its umbrella, leading her to welcome the creature into her apartment.

Soon, Fuji realized the animal was even smarter than she imagined, as it began communicating with her through writing. Whether alone or in the company of family and friends, Fuji's new companion always entertained her with its endearing actions.
